title: lithocarpus howii
intro: Lithocarpus howii, also known as the Taiwan Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae, native to Taiwan. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus howii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Lithocarpus howii can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
